metadata.description: Disgusting flesh from an aberrant creature.
A sword forged in the Abyss, dripping with hellfire.
A spear tipped with an alchemically treated head that dissolves armor on contact.
A dark adamantine ingot suited to legendary smithing.
Distilled elemental air energy.
A thrown flask that ignites on impact, dealing fire damage.
A warm amber fragment trapping ancient pollen and light.
A carved jade amulet that fortifies the body's resilience.
A crystal amulet that heightens awareness and sharpens intuition.
An ornate amulet that lends the wearer an aura of authority and magnetism.
A legendary amulet said to be blessed by a forgotten god of life, granting a second chance at death's door.
A golden amulet set with an emerald that pulses with restorative energy.
A colossal scale from an ancient red dragon. Near-indestructible.
Distilled essence of an ancient red dragon's flame.
A gold coin from a forgotten age, minted by a vampire noble.
A tarnished iron key covered in glowing runes. Opens the Vault of Echoes.
A tattered piece of parchment showing part of a forgotten land. Collect all fragments to reveal a hidden location.

A humming crystal saturated with stored arcane force.
A gem that amplifies arcane spellcasting.
A wooden staff imbued with minor arcane resonance.
Magnificent robes that greatly enhance magical ability.
Standard iron-tipped arrows for use with any bow.
A bundle of forged arrowheads ready for fletching.
A glossy, petrification-resistant scale from a basilisk. Sought after by armorers and alchemists.
A pungent cave reagent used in fertilizers and fire powders.
A sharp bear claw — prized by alchemists.
Raw bear meat. Can be cooked for sustenance.
A black bear pelt.
The central eye of a beholder — can antimagic on command.
A massive belt forged by fire giants, granting the wearer strength beyond mortal limits.
A crystal that perpetually burns with inner fire.

A vial of vampiric blood.

Enchanted boots that dramatically increase movement speed.

Interlocking metal rings providing solid torso protection.

A thick dire wolf pelt of exceptional quality.

A warm, faintly glowing egg. The scholars want this returned immediately.

The heart of an ancient dragon — ultimate alchemical reagent.
